description: a shim file using @deprecated — technically the dhh preset bangs this too, but 37signals also bans it
input:
# app/models/account/legacy_api.rb
# @deprecated These methods exist only for the v1 mobile API. Remove after April 2025.
module Account::LegacyApi
  def api_token = read_attribute(:legacy_token)
  def display_name = "#{first_name} #{last_name}"
end
